title: Cooling and Freezing Equipment Operators and Tenders
description: Operate or tend equipment such as cooling and freezing units, refrigerators, batch freezers, and freezing tunnels, to cool or freeze products, food, blood plasma, and chemicals.

tasks.text: Record temperatures, amounts of materials processed, or test results on report forms.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Monitor pressure gauges, ammeters, flowmeters, thermometers, or products, and adjust controls to maintain specified conditions, such as feed rate, product consistency, temperature, air pressure, and machine speed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Read dials and gauges on panel control boards to ascertain temperatures, alkalinities, and densities of mixtures, and turn valves to obtain specified mixtures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Start machinery, such as pumps, feeders, or conveyors, and turn valves to heat, admit, or transfer products, refrigerants, or mixes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Correct machinery malfunctions by performing actions such as removing jams, and inform supervisors of malfunctions as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assemble equipment, and attach pipes, fittings, or valves, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Measure or weigh specified amounts of ingredients or materials, and load them into tanks, vats, hoppers, or other equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Adjust machine or freezer speed and air intake to obtain desired consistency and amount of product.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Weigh packages and adjust freezer air valves or switches on filler heads to obtain specified amounts of product in each container.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect and flush lines with solutions or steam, and spray equipment with sterilizing solutions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Load and position wrapping paper, sticks, bags, or cartons into dispensing machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sample and test product characteristics such as specific gravity, acidity, and sugar content, using hydrometers, pH meters, or refractometers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Start agitators to blend contents, or start beater, scraper, and expeller blades to mix contents with air and prevent sticking.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Insert forming fixtures, and start machines that cut frozen products into measured portions or specified shapes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Place or position containers into equipment, and remove containers after completion of cooling or freezing processes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Scrape, dislodge, or break excess frost, ice, or frozen product from equipment to prevent accumulation, using hands and hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Activate mechanical rakes to regulate flow of ice from storage bins to vats.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Stir material with spoons or paddles to mix ingredients or allow even cooling and prevent coagulation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
